summary: Carlos is a 26-year-old boda boda (motorcycle taxi) operator in Nairobi. He manages his own M-Pesa float, knows every shortcut in the city, and has been saving through a local chama group for 3 years.

skills.evidence: Knows every shortcut in the city
Uses English with tourists and business clients
Manages M-Pesa float for customer payments

skills.source_activity: Navigating traffic and road hazards daily
Building a loyal client base over 4 years
Maintaining own motorcycle to minimize downtime
Making split-second routing decisions in traffic

intake_transcript.question: What do you spend most of your time doing each day?
intake_transcript.answer: I ride boda boda from early morning. I pick up passengers and also deliver small packages for businesses in Westlands.

intake_transcript.question: What skills have you learned on your own?
intake_transcript.answer: I know every road in Nairobi. I also learned to manage my M-Pesa so customers can pay me directly without cash.

intake_transcript.question: What languages do you speak?
intake_transcript.answer: Swahili is my first language. I speak English when I carry tourists or business people.

intake_transcript.question: Have you ever taught someone or organized people?
intake_transcript.answer: I am in a chama with 12 other boda boda guys. We save together every month and take turns getting the pot.

intake_transcript.question: What tools or technology do you use?
intake_transcript.answer: My motorcycle, a smartphone with M-Pesa, Google Maps when a customer gives me an address I don't know.
